description: Evals for spec-to-design — verifies triggering accuracy and functional behavior

evals.prompt: Design the feature from the spec
Create a DESIGN.md for the dashboard feature
evals.description: Trigger using the output file name

evals.prompt: Generate a frontend design document from our checkout spec
evals.description: Trigger via 'frontend design' phrasing — web-specific intent

evals.prompt: Create a mobile design from the spec for our iOS app
evals.description: Should trigger spec-to-mobile-design, not spec-to-design — native mobile target

evals.prompt: Generate an implementation plan from the spec
evals.description: Should trigger spec-to-plan, not spec-to-design — planning, not design

evals.prompt: Design the REST API endpoints for the authentication service
evals.description: Should NOT trigger spec-to-design — backend/API, no user interface
